variants.name: 拾荒者
variants.ability: 每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时，你要选择一个非恶魔的角色：如果这个角色在场，你会得知他是谁，否则，你会得知错误信息。
variants.firstNightReminder: The Ragpicker may point to a character. Point to the player with that character token. If there are none, point to any player.
variants.otherNightReminder: The Ragpicker may point to a character. Point to the player with that character token. If there are none, point to any player.
variants.flavor: Yes, this is a real job, now let me get back to my garbage!
